_comment: Copy this file to config/topics.json to choose your own niche. 'contentStyle' shapes how every story/video sounds. 'topics' is the pool the system picks from each run (it avoids recently used ones). Swap these for ANY niche — see the examples in the README.
contentStyle: gripping, emotional first-person stories that feel completely real — like a true confession someone posted online
topics: My girlfriend was caught cheating, and her excuse made it ten times worse
My boss fired me for a mistake he actually made five years ago
I found a hidden camera in a gift from my lifelong best friend
My sister stole my identity and lived a double life for years
My landlord installed hidden microphones to spy on every tenant
My closest friend has been secretly dating my ex for two years
I inherited a locked safe and its contents destroyed my family
My in-laws hired a private investigator to dig up dirt before my wedding
